Description: The country and year of the start of the yellow fever outbreak which corresponds with the outbreak.identifier column in the YF_RVCs.csv
Year when the outbreak started
The name of the country where the outbreak was recorded

Date of onset of the index case
if index was confirmed it is indicated, if it was not mentioned to be confirmed then it remained as suspected or probable

Date of first local reactive vaccination campaign. local reactive vaccination campeign is a reactive vaccination campeign done in the intial onset of the outbreak with vaccination that are readily available in the country. Indicated by words like small scale or local.

Date of first reactive mass vaccination campaign. A reactive vaccination campaign is not a local reactive vaccination campaign. Specifically, a reactive mass vaccionation campaign is either called a reactive mass vaccination campaign and/or organized with international partners.
Total cases reported during outbreak, includes the last number confirmed, suspected, and probable cases during the outbreak reporting period
